package.name: openral_nav2_bringup
package.description: ADR-0025 — bringup wrapper for upstream Nav2 as the second OpenRAL Reasoner-managed background service (after slam_toolbox). Ships a minimal Nav2 parameter set tuned for the panda_mobile holonomic base + a stand-alone launch file the deploy CLI includes when the robot manifest declares a wrapped-action navigate rSkill. The Nav2 lifecycle nodes (bt_navigator, controller_server, planner_server, behavior_server, smoother_server, velocity_smoother) come up via Nav2's own lifecycle_manager (use_lifecycle_manager: true is the Nav2 convention — Nav2's bringup_launch.py wires it in-package).
